title: Mega Charizard Y Battle Guide
summary: A [fire]/[flying] special attacker that auto-sets sun with [drought] — 159 Special Attack plus sun-boosted [fire-blast] and one-turn [solar-beam] is one of the format's best nukes.
strengths: 159 Special Attack is the highest among practical Megas

recommendedItems.reason: Mandatory Mega Stone with no alternative

bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
Mega Charizard Y is a sun-setting special attacker — [drought] auto-activates sun on entry, 159 Special Attack drops it behind only a handful of legendaries, and the sun-boosted [fire-blast] + one-turn [solar-beam] combination is one of the most lethal two-move sets in the format.

## Strengths
[drought] means you do not need another sun setter. Sun makes [fire-blast] 50% stronger and turns [solar-beam] into a one-turn Grass move for coverage. 159 Special Attack plus STAB plus the sun boost compounds into a nuke that punches through most neutral walls. [air-slash] adds [flying] STAB with a flinch chance for unexpected tempo plays.

## Weaknesses & Answers
4x Rock is catastrophic — stealth-rock halves HP on entry, and stone-edge or rock-slide are guaranteed KOs. Electric and Water weaknesses are common, and 78/78 physical bulk does not survive priority hits from strong attackers.

## Recommended Moveset
[fire-blast] is the primary STAB. [solar-beam] is the sun-abuse move that wrecks Water and Ground walls. [air-slash] adds [flying] STAB with flinch utility. [protect] secures Mega safety and partner setups.

## Item · Ability · Tera
[charizardite-y] is mandatory. [drought] activates after Mega Evolution. Tera [fire] stacks on STAB and sun boost for maximum damage, while Tera [flying] turns the Rock 4x weakness into a 2x.

## Teammates & Synergy
Pair with torkoal or groudon for a backup sun setter, and with chlorophyll sweepers like venusaur that capitalize on the same weather. Hazard control is essential because stealth-rock halves HP. Cover Water and Electric with Grass or Ground partners.

## Play Patterns
Enter the field to set sun, Mega evolve, protect on risk turns, and then fire [fire-blast] into almost everything. Click [solar-beam] on Water types and [air-slash] on Grass or Fighting types. Tera for damage when you commit to closing a match.
